{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/38559302?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kamil-sawicki", "id": 38559302, "login": "kamil-sawicki", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM4NTU5MzAy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kamil-sawicki", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49284", "cvss": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}], "description": "## Summary

SimpleSAMLphp's SAML SP ACS path does not enforce the IdP selected for an SP-initiated login. If a saved SP state contains `ExpectedIssuer = IdP A`, but the ACS receives a valid response from `IdP B`, the code logs a warning and continues processing instead of rejecting the response.

That behavior becomes security-relevant when combined with the response-processing rule that accepts an unsigned `samlp:Response/@InResponseTo` outside the signed assertion whenever the signed assertion's `SubjectConfirmationData` does not carry its own `InResponseTo`. A response issued by one trusted IdP can therefore be bound to SP state created for another IdP.

## Impact

In a multi-IdP deployment, a lower-trust IdP can satisfy SP state created for a different expected IdP. This can bypass an SP flow that intentionally routes the user to a specific IdP, including deployments that set `enable_unsolicited` to `false` to prevent IdP-initiated logins.

The impact is highest when the SP trusts multiple IdPs with different assurance levels, tenant boundaries, or attribute namespaces, and application authorization depends on the selected/expected IdP. In those deployments this is an authentication/authorization bypass candidate. Impact strongly depends on whether an attacker can obtain a signed IdP-initiated assertion from a lower-trust trusted IdP and whether the downstream application maps identifiers globally.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00229, "percentile": 0.13646}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T20:47:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49284"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T20:47:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp/security/advisories/GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp/security-advisories/GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp", "summary": "SimpleSAMLphp SP accepts a response from an unexpected IdP when unsigned `Response/InResponseTo` is combined with a signed assertion lacking `SubjectConfirmationData/InResponseTo`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T20:47:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8r6-xj3f-wrrm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.5.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.5.0, <= 2.5.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.4.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.4.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: SimpleSAMLphp SP accepts a response from an unexpected IdP when unsigned `Response/InResponseTo` is combined with a signed assertion lacking `SubjectConfirmationData/InResponseTo`
